_comment: Runtime configuration for the Live2D renderer. All values here are tuning knobs — changing them takes effect on the next renderer invocation with no C++ rebuild required.

breath._comment: Idle breathing animation parameters. Each axis: offset (rest position), peak (amplitude), cycle (period in seconds), weight (blend contribution).

lipsync._comment: Rhubarb phoneme-to-mouth-parameter mappings. open = MouthOpenY value [0,1], form = MouthForm value [-1,1].
lipsync._comment_smoothing: Blend weights applied when writing mouth params each frame. Higher = more responsive, lower = smoother.

animation._comment: Reaction motion and breath guard tuning.
animation._comment_priority: Minimum motion priority level that activates the breath guard.

normalisation._comment_auto_rate: When normalise_rate=0 (auto), rate = max_breath_speed * auto_rate_multiplier. fallback_rate used when breath speed unavailable.

render._comment: Post-scene padding so the avatar settles after the last cue.

ffmpeg._comment: Codec quality settings per output format.
